# King's Cut — El Cajon's Premier Barbershop

> King's Cut is a family-owned barbershop on Jamacha Road in El Cajon, California, serving the East County community since 2007. Owner: Maysam.

## Business Information
- Name: King's Cut
- Address: 729 Jamacha Rd, El Cajon, CA 92019
- Phone: (619) 334-6665
- Founded: 2007 (~18 years in business)
- Hours: Monday–Saturday 9 AM – 7 PM, Sunday 9 AM – 3 PM
- Walk-ins: Welcome
- Wheelchair accessible: Yes
- Family friendly: All ages

## Services
- Men's haircuts (fades, tapers, scissor cuts)
- Kids haircuts
- Senior haircuts
- Beard trimming and shaping
- Straight razor shaves
- Full shaves and head shaves
- Waxing (ears, nose, brow)
- Threading
- Facials (on request)

## Barbers
- Maysam (Owner & Master Barber)
- David (Senior Barber)
- Omar (Barber)
- Manny (Barber)
- Methak (Barber, traditional shave specialist)

- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/BarberStylistCoiffure/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/kingcutsbarbershopsalon/

## Reputation
- Yelp: 4.1★ across 116 verified reviews
- Facebook check-ins: 1,238
- Instagram followers: 347
